[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 101111111 8
4 001111101 6
5 111110110 7
6 111111011 8
7 110110111 7
